title: fix: align Azure GPT Image pricing
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Balancing the books
gist.blurb: We've fine-tuned how we track Azure GPT Image usage under the hood. Just keeping the hive's accounting perfectly balanced!
gist.summary: Aligned internal billing metrics for Azure GPT Image 1.5 to accurately track text and image prompt costs.
gist.impact: Ensures accurate internal cost tracking for image generation without affecting the user experience.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing accounting or math, representing the billing alignment. The Nomnom creature eating receipts or data to show processing of usage details.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, using a retro calculator to balance a ledger. The round Nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stack of paper receipts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, using a retro calculator to balance a ledger. The round Nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stack of paper receipts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
